DMATMS.notes: Aminosilane inhibitor (Kim et al. 2026). Caps -OH/-NH by releasing dimethylamine; silyl group sterically blocks growth.

TMCS.notes: Chlorosilane inhibitor; caps -OH releasing HCl. Classic oxide-selective capping agent -> expect strong on SiO2.

NH3.notes: Small Lewis base; probes N/H-bonding blocking without covalent capping.

pyridine.notes: Aromatic base; coordinates to Lewis-acidic / protic sites.

ODTS.notes: Octadecyltrichlorosilane inhibitor; caps -OH/-NH releasing HCl. Form hydrophobic SAM.

ODPA.notes: Octadecylphosphonic acid inhibitor; coordinates to oxide/nitride surfaces to form SAM.

UDA.notes: Undecylaldehyde inhibitor; physisorbs/coordinates via carbonyl group.

hacac.notes: Acetylacetone ligand; chelates/coordinates to surface protic/Lewis sites.

BDMAS.notes: SiO2 ALD precursor; chemisorbs on -OH releasing amine. Fragment is an approximation of the SiH2(NMe2)-anchor.

SiCl4.notes: Halide SiO2 precursor; chemisorbs on -OH releasing HCl.

DIPAS.notes: Di(isopropylamino)silane precursor; chemisorbs on -OH releasing isopropylamine.

H2O.notes: Oxidant co-reactant that re-hydroxylates the growth surface.
